opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Ruined couch → showroom sofa in 5 min for $49
opportunities.before_state: Stained, pet-hair-covered couch that guests apologize for sitting on
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, waterproof sofa that looks brand new — no one suspects it is a cover
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's June rental-transformation wave is sending renters searching for cheap sofa refreshes, and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes every unit converted outsized revenue.

opportunities.product_category: solar outdoor pathway and stair lights
opportunities.specific_product: Solar stair and pathway LED light set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dark hazardous deck stairs → lit summer nights for $28
opportunities.before_state: Pitch-black patio stairs and garden path that become a tripping hazard after sunset
opportunities.after_state: Warmly glowing outdoor stairway that extends summer entertaining safely into the evening
opportunities.why_now: Duke Energy outage searches (1,000+) and a 200,000+ state-of-emergency trend are priming homeowners for off-grid lighting while BHG is actively pinning Amazon solar stair light roundups this week.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 4-piece outdoor conversation set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Bare empty deck → outdoor living room for $279
opportunities.before_state: Bare concrete or wood deck with no seating — summer cookouts and hosting happening indoors by default
opportunities.after_state: Styled outdoor lounge with cushioned seating ready for Fourth of July gatherings and weekend cookouts
opportunities.why_now: HGTV is flooding Pinterest with summer outdoor entertaining and Fourth of July backyard styling content right now, funneling aspirational shoppers toward Amazon for affordable patio setups.

opportunities.specific_product: Wall-mounted entryway organizer with hooks, shelf, and mail compartment
opportunities.transformation_hook: Chaotic front door → organized entryway for $55
opportunities.before_state: Shoes piled at the door, keys lost daily, bags dumped on the floor — first impression to every guest is pure clutter
opportunities.after_state: Clean styled entry with dedicated hooks and a shelf that makes leaving the house stress-free and impresses visitors instantly
opportunities.why_now: RealSimple is pinning organized-habits content and HGTV's colorful mudroom design pins are surging ahead of summer hosting season, pushing consumers toward quick entryway wins.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Waking up with neck pain → best sleep of your life for $95
opportunities.before_state: Flat unsupportive pillow causing morning neck stiffness and restless nights for side sleepers
opportunities.after_state: Contoured ergonomic cutout pillow that eliminates shoulder pressure and delivers consistent deep sleep
opportunities.why_now: Summer heat is disrupting sleep quality and bedroom transformation content is surging on Apartment Therapy, making Eli & Elm's 20% commission on a $95 AOV the strongest pure-revenue play in the set.
